sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17462" key="au)lw|diko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐλῳδ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n17462.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐλῳδία, νόμοι</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1132c</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
